purpose: Capture the founder's fuzzy idea (typed or pasted) and submit it to shape the skeleton anchor — the single on-line Setup step before First Strike.

contains.text-intent: Ask the founder to describe or paste their fuzzy product idea in their own words
Reassure this is the only step before they see their anchor, and that specforge shapes the skeleton from their words rather than a template — set the expectation of speed and discipline
Free-text area that captures object:shaping.idea-seed; its placeholder carries a concrete example idea and invites paste, lowering blank-canvas cost (the ability bumper for blank-field paralysis)
Submit the idea to shape the skeleton anchor — the First-Strike gesture
